summary.weather: Seoul (Monday, March 30, 2026): Clear skies, no precipitation. Temperatures expected to range between 7.7°C (46°F) and 15.5°C (60°F).
summary.market: KOSPI faces ongoing volatility due to global risk-off sentiment and tech sector weakness. Despite near-term pressure from geopolitical risks and foreign outflows, Goldman Sachs maintains a positive long-term outlook for 2026 citing AI memory supercycle prospects.
summary.art: Seoul Art Scene (March 2026): Highlights include the Kim Yun-shin retrospective at Hoam Museum, Damien Hirst at MMCA, and the "20!2026 Art Seoul" digital exhibit featuring an 80% refund guarantee to boost market trust.

system.raw: Dashboard refreshed (1:25 AM). Market: Volatility persists, tech sector under pressure, but long-term AI outlook remains robust. Art: Major retrospectives (Kim Yun-shin, Hirst) and trust-building initiatives (refund guarantees) dominate.
